commentaries.author: Douay Rheims 1609
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 1 Chronicles 18:7 And David took the shields of gold that were on the servants of Hadadezer, and brought them to Jerusalem. Douay Rheims 1609 And his sister (b) Queen bare (c) Good man, and AbJezer, and Mohola. (b) Molecheth: Regina Queen. (c) Isbod, Virum decorum, that is, A comely personable or good man. So we leave the Hebrew names in this place because St. Jerome, and the whole Church doth so in the Latin text, which we translate.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Quivers. Hebrew, "the shields "The term is variously translated, 2 Kings.
